title: Necessary Evil: Super-Villains of DC Comics
original_title: Necessary Evil: Super-Villains of DC Comics
overview: A documentary detailing the epic Rogues' Gallery of DC Comics from The Joker and Lex Luthor, Sinestro, Darkseid and more, this documentary will explore the Super Villains of DC Comics.
